title: Senior Software Engineer II- Adobe
description:
Optum is a global organization that delivers care, aided by technology to help millions of people live healthier lives. The work you do with our team will directly improve health outcomes by connecting people with the care, pharmacy benefits, data and resources they need to feel their best. Here, you will find a culture guided by inclusion, talented peers, comprehensive benefits and career development opportunities. Come make an impact on the communities we serve as you help us advance health optimization on a global scale. Join us to start **Caring. Connecting. Growing together.**

**Job Summary:**

The Senior Software Engineer II serves as an advanced technical support and application platform owner responsible for the stability, reliability, and day‑to‑day operation of enterprise software. This role provides expert‑level troubleshooting and escalation support for complex and high‑impact issues across desktop and cloud‑based environments.

The position has primary ownership for advanced support of Adobe Creative Cloud and Adobe Document Cloud applications, along with other desktop technologies. The role requires platform and cloud expertise to diagnose issues, perform root cause analysis, implement long‑term fixes, and support automation and modernization efforts. The Senior Software Engineer II partners closely with systems management, security, and engineering teams to ensure consistent, secure, and reliable enterprise application services.

**Primary Responsibilities:**

* Architect, design, and evolve scalable, resilient, cloud‑native solutions that meet enterprise functional, performance, security, and compliance requirements
* Serve as the technical owner and advanced support lead for assigned enterprise desktop and cloud application platforms, including Adobe Creative Cloud and Adobe Document Cloud
* Design, implement, integrate, and support Adobe enterprise environments across their full application lifecycle, including intake, configuration, upgrades, patching, and retirement
* Provide expert‑level troubleshooting, escalation management, and root cause analysis for complex, high‑impact platform and application issues, ensuring performance, reliability, and a positive end‑user experience
* Apply advanced cloud and systems engineering expertise to improve platform scalability, reliability, automation, and operational efficiency
* Build and integrate automated workflows and enterprise‑approved AI capabilities to streamline engineering processes and reduce manual effort
* Ensure application platforms align with enterprise security, risk, and compliance standards, including vulnerability remediation
* Utilize ServiceNow to manage incidents, requests, changes, and problem records in accordance with ITSM best practices
* Collaborate with security, systems management, ITAM, support teams, and vendors to develop roadmap and deliver stable, well‑supported enterprise solutions
* Evaluate emerging trends in cloud architecture, automation, and AI to inform solution design and drive strategic innovation
* Develop and maintain technical documentation, including architecture diagrams, operational runbooks, and troubleshooting guides
* Comply with the terms and conditions of the employment contract, company policies and procedures, and any and all directives (such as, but not limited to, transfer and/or re-assignment to different work locations, change in teams and/or work shifts, policies in regards to flexibility of work benefits and/or work environment, alternative work arrangements, and other decisions that may arise due to the changing business environment). The Company may adopt, vary or rescind these policies and directives in its absolute discretion and without any limitation (implied or otherwise) on its ability to do so

**Required Qualifications:**

* 6+ years of experience implementing and supporting software, systems, or platform engineering within enterprise environments
* Proven experience building, supporting, and operating production‑grade application platforms
* Advanced experience providing Level 3 support, including complex troubleshooting, root cause analysis, and long‑term remediation
* Hands‑on experience supporting cloud‑based application services
* Solid expertise in enterprise desktop application installation, configuration, and troubleshooting, including Windows registry and platform internals
* Demonstrated AI user skills, including leveraging AI tools for research, analysis, and streamlining daily workflows
* Proven solid analytical and problem‑solving skills, with the ability to independently own complex technical issues
* Proven customer-focused attitude with a commitment to providing high-quality support. Advanced understanding of desktop application installation, configuration, and troubleshooting

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Experience implementing and supporting Adobe Creative Cloud and Adobe Document Cloud technologies in an enterprise environment.
* Experience supporting Microsoft M365
* Experience with product lifecycle management (PLM) concepts
* Experience with network protocols and troubleshooting
* Experience working in large, complex enterprise environments
* Advanced knowledge of cloud technologies and cloud‑based platform solutions
* Familiarity with enterprise security and vulnerability management practices

*At UnitedHealth Group, our mission is to help people live healthier lives and make the health system work better for everyone. We believe everyone-of every race, gender, sexuality, age, location and income-deserves the opportunity to live their healthiest life. Today, however, there are still far too many barriers to good health which are disproportionately experienced by people of color, historically marginalized groups and those with lower incomes. We are committed to mitigating our impact on the environment and enabling and delivering equitable care that addresses health disparities and improves health outcomes - an enterprise priority reflected in our mission.*

title: Wordpress Developer
description:
Job Description: WordPress Developer – BestDrive

**Job Title:** WordPress Developer  
**Department:** Technology / Web Development  
**Location:** Remote / On-site (as applicable)  
**Job Type:** Full-time  
**Experience:** 2–5+ Years

About BestDrive

BestDrive is looking for a talented **WordPress Developer** to build, customize, and maintain high-performance WordPress websites. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in custom theme and plugin development, website optimization, security, and responsive design. You will work closely with the design, marketing, and development teams to deliver fast, secure, and SEO-friendly websites.

Key Responsibilities

* Develop, customize, and maintain WordPress websites based on business requirements.
* Build custom WordPress themes and plugins from scratch or customize existing ones.
* Convert Figma, Adobe XD, or PSD designs into responsive WordPress websites.
* Optimize website performance, page speed, and Core Web Vitals.
* Ensure websites are mobile-friendly and compatible across all major browsers.
* Integrate third-party APIs, payment gateways, CRM systems, and marketing tools.
* Implement website security best practices, backups, and regular updates.
* Troubleshoot website issues, bugs, and plugin conflicts.
* Manage website migrations, hosting environments, and deployment processes.
* Collaborate with UI/UX designers, digital marketers, and content teams to improve user experience.
* Implement SEO best practices, schema markup, and website analytics.
* Maintain proper documentation and version control using Git.

Required Skills

* 2–5+ years of experience in WordPress development.
* Strong proficiency in **WordPress, PHP, MySQL, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and jQuery**.
* Experience developing custom themes and plugins.
* Knowledge of popular page builders such as **Elementor, WPBakery, or Gutenberg**.
* Experience with WooCommerce customization and payment gateway integration.
* Familiarity with Advanced Custom Fields (ACF), Custom Post Types (CPT), and REST APIs.
* Understanding of website security, caching, and performance optimization.
* Experience with Git, GitHub/GitLab, and deployment workflows.
* Knowledge of SEO, Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and Core Web Vitals.
* Basic understanding of web hosting, DNS, SSL, cPanel, and Cloudflare.
* Strong debugging, analytical, and problem-solving skills.

Preferred Qualifications

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
* Experience with headless WordPress, React.js, or Next.js is an advantage.
* Familiarity with AWS, DigitalOcean, or other cloud hosting platforms.
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.
* WordPress or WooCommerce certifications are a plus.

Key Competencies

* Strong coding and debugging skills.
* Attention to detail and commitment to quality.
* Problem-solving and analytical thinking.
* Effective communication and collaboration.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.
* Continuous learning and adaptability.

What We Offer

* Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.
* Opportunity to work on innovative web projects.
* Collaborative and technology-driven work environment.
* Career growth and skill development opportunities.
* Exposure to the latest WordPress technologies and development practices.

How to Apply

Interested candidates should share:

* Updated Resume
* Portfolio or live website links
* GitHub Profile (preferred)
* Current CTC
* Expected CTC
* Notice Period
* LinkedIn Profile (optional)

**Join BestDrive and help build secure, high-performing, and user-friendly WordPress websites that deliver exceptional digital experiences for our customers.**

Pay: ₹11,110.98 - ₹22,463.82 per month

Experience:

* WordPress: 2 years (Required)

Work Location: In person

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer IV
description:
**ABOUT US**

At Vida, we help people get better- and we're helping the healthcare system get better, too.

Vida is a virtual, personalized obesity care provider that uses evidence-based treatment to help patients manage obesity and related conditions like diabetes, high blood pressure, anxiety and depression. Vida's team of Obesity Medicine-Certified Physicians, Registered Dietitians, Expert Coaches and Licensed Therapists takes a whole-person approach to care, helping people lose weight, reduce stress and improve their overall health.

By combining advanced technology with top-notch healthcare providers, Vida is breaking down the barriers that have historically kept people from getting the best care. It's trusted by Fortune 100 companies, major national payers and large providers to enable their employees to live their healthiest lives.

Vida Health is seeking a Senior Full Stack Engineer to help shape the technical direction of our Provider Team. In this role, you will design, build, and maintain the backend services and user-facing applications that power our clinician and provider workflows — making a direct impact on how care is delivered at scale.

This is more than an execution role. You will partner closely with Product, Design, Operations, and Engineering to drive initiatives from early ambiguity through to production, bringing both technical depth and cross-functional leadership to everything you do. Your work will span Python, Django, REST APIs, and React or React Native, with a focus on building provider tools that are reliable, scalable, and built to support the clinicians who depend on them every day.

### **Responsibilities:**

* Lead the technical discovery, scoping, and execution of complex features, collaborating seamlessly with Product, Design, QA, and business stakeholders.
* Own features end-to-end. Break down large initiatives into actionable engineering milestones and guide the team toward successful delivery.
* Act as a strong, proactive communicator who can translate complex technical challenges into clear business outcomes for non-technical partners.
* Champion high engineering standards through thorough code reviews, architectural discussions, and mentorship of mid-level and junior engineers.
* Act with a high degree of autonomy on the frontend. You can take loose product requirements and rapidly iterate on user interfaces without needing exhaustive, pixel-perfect specs from a design team for every change.
* Build and maintain high-performance frontend applications using React, TypeScript, and React Query.
* Support and contribute to our React Native mobile applications.
* Apply strong product intuition and UX sensibilities to build clean, logical, and user-friendly flows using component libraries like Tailwind or MUI.
* Design, build, and optimize robust REST APIs using Django REST Framework (DRF).
* Develop and evolve clean database models, schemas, and complex migrations.
* Leverage LLMs and AI tooling, specifically Claude and Claude Code, to accelerate development workflows and build innovative, automated features.
* Monitor, troubleshoot, and scale production services deployed via Kubernetes on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) using Datadog and logging best practices.
* Additional responsibilities as assigned.

### **Qualifications:**

* Bachelors degree at a minimum.
* 7+ years of professional software engineering experience with a proven track record of leading technical projects and cross-functional initiatives.
* Strong product and design intuition. You are comfortable building and refining interfaces independently, leveraging component frameworks to deliver great user experiences quickly without a design crutch.
* Deep expertise in Python, Django models, and Django REST Framework (DRF) for building production-grade REST APIs.
* Robust experience with modern React, state management via React Query, and TypeScript.
* Strong experience writing optimized queries, designing schemas, and managing database migrations.
* Experience utilizing AI assistance, specifically Claude and Claude Code, to write, test, refactor, and optimize code efficiently.
* Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to build consensus across different teams.

### **Preferred:**

* Experience navigating healthcare technology, HIPAA compliance, or digital health platforms.
* Hands-on experience with React Native.
* Familiarity with containerized environments using Docker and Kubernetes, and cloud infrastructure like GCP or AWS.
* Experience with event-driven architectures, Celery, or message brokers like Pub/Sub or RabbitMQ.

*Vida is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action employer.*

*Diversity is more than a commitment at Vida—it is the foundation of what we do. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, ancestry, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, marital status, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants with criminal histories, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law.*

*We seek to recruit, develop and retain the most talented people from a diverse candidate pool. We don’t just accept differences — we celebrate them, we support them, and we thrive on them for the benefit of our employees, our platform and those we serve. Vida is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures.*

We do not accept unsolicited assistance from any headhunters or recruitment firms for any of our job openings. All resumes or profiles submitted by search firms to any employee at Vida in any form without a valid, signed search agreement in place for the specific position will be deemed the sole property of Vida. No fee will be paid in the event the candidate is hired by Vida as a result of the unsolicited referral.

***\*\*Vida is authorized to do business in many, but not all, states. If you are not located in or able to work from a state where Vida is registered, you will not be eligible for employment. Please speak with your recruiter to learn more about where Vida is registered.***

**Please note:** **Applicants must be authorized to work in the U.S. as Vida is unable to sponsor work visas for any position.**

**All Vida Employees must reside in/be able to work from the U.S.- international work is prohibited. Job postings at Vida are evergreen and will remain open through end of year, until filled.**

title: Vice President, Full-Stack Engineer II
company: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation
description:
Job Description

The Bank of New York Mellon seeks Vice President, Full-Stack Engineer II in Jersey City, NJ, to consult with internal business groups to provide appropriate application software development services or technical support. Provide application software development services or technical support in more complex situations. Responsible for requirements gathering and BRD/SRD preparation with thorough knowledge of the Software Development Life Cycle. Conduct reviews of the test Plan and test Data. Coordinate the technical design, development and documentation of cross-functional, multi-platform application systems. Analyze, define and document requirements for data, workflow, and logical processes and interfaces with other systems. Ensure that expected application performance levels are achieved by coordinating, coding, testing, implementation and documentation. Program well-designed, testable, efficient code. Develop flowcharts, layouts and documentation to satisfy requirements and solutions. Maintain software functionality and currency (technical debt and gain). Actively participate in code reviews. Apply security and privacy principles. Execute full lifecycle software development. Develop software verification plans and quality assurance procedures. Troubleshoot, debug and upgrade existing systems. Ensure software is updated with latest features. Use learning tools such as Pluralsight to complete both recommended and aspirational targets set in personal development plans. Provide ongoing maintenance, support and enhancements in existing systems and platforms. Leverage existing products/functionality and promote reuse. Work alongside other engineers on the team to elevate technology and consistently apply best practices. Collaborate cross-functionally with data engineers, business users, project managers and other engineers to achieve elegant solutions. Compile documentation written by more senior developers of all procedures used in system. Remote work may be permitted within a commutable distance from the worksite.

REQUIREMENTS: Bachelor’s degree, or foreign equivalent, in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electronic Engineering, or a related field, and seven (7) years of progressively responsible experience in the job offered or in a related IT occupation in the financial services industry. Seven (7) years of progressively responsible experience must include: Utilizing Java/J2EE technology to create software solutions, design, develop, technically troubleshoot, build solutions, and break down technical problems; Implementing REST APIs and scalable Micro services using open-source Java frameworks including Spring MVC, Hibernate, JPA, MongoDB, Spring boot, and design patterns; Creating real-time data streaming solutions and handling messaging services and event-driven communication using Spring Boot, Spring Batch, WebSocket, Apache Kafka, and RabbitMQ; Working Oracle database and multiple database tools including DB2 and SQL; Building an application that exposes components as Micro Frontends, allowing them to be consumed directly in Web and Mobile platforms, thereby achieving seamless integration and modularization of components using Node.js, React and Angular Framework; and Utilizing Agile methodology including CI/CD, application resiliency and security, as well as handling developmental toolsets including GIT/Bitbucket, Splunk, Junit, SonarQube, JIRA, Maven and Veracode.

Qualified applicants please apply online at https://bnymellon.eightfold.ai/careers and utilize reference code #76619. Please indicate “referral source – advertisement – WEB.”

BNY assesses market data to ensure a competitive compensation package for our employees. The base salary/range for this position is expected to be $189,592.00 - $209,000.00 per year at the commencement of employment. Base salary if hired will be determined on an individualized basis, including as to experience and market location, and is only part of the BNY total compensation package, which, depending on the position, may also include commission earnings, discretionary bonuses, short and long-term incentive packages, and Company-sponsored benefit programs.

This position is at-will, and the Company reserves the right to modify the base salary (as well as any other discretionary payment or compensation) at any time, including for reasons related to individual performance, change in geographic location, Company or individual department/team performance, and market factors.

BNY is an Equal Employment Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer. Minorities/Females/Individuals with Disabilities/Protected Veterans.

title: Full Stack Engineer – Rural Health Program Workflow & Platform Solutions (REMOTE)
description:
Description

**FULL STACK ENGINEER - RURAL HEALTH PROGRAM WORKFLOW & PLATFORM SOLUTIONS**

ICF is seeking a Full Stack Engineer for a Rural Health Program to designs, builds, and maintains full-stack features supporting a scalable Workflow & Platform Solution for large-scale public sector programs, including intake, workflow management, and performance tracking.

You will:

* Build configurable workflows with stage progression, role-based tasking, status tracking, and automated notifications aligned to program operations.
* Develop and integrate automation and AI-assisted capabilities to improve efficiency and structure unstructured inputs, while preserving appropriate human review.
* Implement reporting and dashboard features that provide clear visibility into participation, progress, and outcomes for internal teams and external stakeholders.
* Develop data inputs and integrations, including structured forms, document management, and connections to approved external data sources.
* Translate business requirements into technical solutions, communicates feasibility and timelines, supports demos and training, and drives continuous improvement through user feedback.

Up to 25% travel may be required.

**Basic Qualifications:**

* Minimum 3 years of professional experience in full stack software development
* Strong experience with modern full-stack web development, including a current JavaScript/TypeScript front-end framework and a server-side runtime
* Experience designing and building applications backed by relational databases
* Experience integrating RESTful APIs and external services into applications
* Hands-on experience integrating large language model (LLM) capabilities into applications, such as structured extraction, summarization, or evaluation against defined criteria
* Experience building multi-step, stateful processes with reliable execution, including human-in-the-loop steps and audit history
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to adapt technical explanations to non-technical audiences including program staff and state agency stakeholders
* Demonstrated ability to manage ambiguity and ship useful software when requirements are still taking shape

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* Experience in a client-facing, embedded, or consulting engineering role
* Experience building case management, workflow, or grant and program management systems
* Experience working with Federal, state or local government clients
* Experience handling personally identifiable information (PII) responsibly and supporting data governance
* Domain interest or experience in health, rural health, or public sector program delivery
* Proficiency with AI-assisted coding tools in a professional setting
* Experience with CI/CD practices and automated testing

title: Software Dev Engineer II, Amazon Payment Products
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------

Looking for Software Development Engineer to be part of a dynamic development environment within Amazon, be at the forefront of building new, innovative global payments products and solutions.  
  
Amazon Payments team at Amazon India Development Center, Bangalore is looking for developers to design and build next generation global payments solutions that revolutionize the way customers pay. The Amazon Payments Team manages all Amazon branded payment offerings, globally. These offerings are growing rapidly and we are continuously adding new market-leading features and launching new products. Our payments products (Amazon Co-Branded Credit Cards, Amazon and Branded Gift Cards, Shop with Points, and many others) provide the most innovative payment experience on and off Amazon.  
As we build innovative payments solutions for our customers, the role provides a huge opportunity for the developers to build a strong portfolio of patents for Amazon. The role will also include defining and implementing extensible, multi-faceted solutions that support global and region specific payments specific protocols and workflows. This is a critical program for payments team, with high leadership visibility, and opportunity for delivering significant business value.  
  
Developer in the team needs a strong understanding of Computer fundamentals and practical experience in building full stack, large scale distributed systems. Experience with web-based applications and/or web services-based applications, especially at massive scale, is also helpful.  
  
Key job responsibilities  

* Define, design, and implement multi-tier distributed software applications.
* Estimate engineering effort, plan implementation, and rollout system changes that meet requirements for functionality, performance, scalability, reliability, and adherence to development goals.
* Must be able to design code and test major features, as well as work jointly with other team members to deliver complex changes.
* Must be able to effectively collaborate in a fast paced environment with multiple teams in a large organization (software development, QA, Project/Release Management, Build and Release, etc.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 3+ years of non-internship professional software development experience
* 2+ years of non-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience
* 3+ years of Video Games Industry (supporting title Development, Release, or Live Ops) experience
* Experience programming with at least one software programming language
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 3+ years of full software development life cycle, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, build processes, testing, and operations experience

  
Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. title: Full Stack Developer Intern
description:
**Technical Engineering Intern (Full-Stack / Multi-Stack)**

We are looking for a highly adaptable, proactive, and tech-savvy **Technical Engineering Intern** to join our dynamic development team. In this role, you won't be boxed into a single language or framework. Instead, you will work closely with our engineering leadership to support a wide array of active web applications, internal systems, and modern decoupled architectures.

If you are a fast learner who thrives on variety, switching from Python backend APIs to modern JavaScript frontends, or diving into robust CMS platforms, this role is for you.

**Key Responsibilities**

* **Full-Stack Support:** Assist in building, maintaining, and debugging applications across various layers of our technology stack.
* **API & Backend Development:** Help write clean, scalable server-side logic and develop robust RESTful APIs.
* **Frontend Execution:** Collaborate with UI/UX teams to translate wireframes into pixel-perfect, responsive web interfaces.
* **CMS Management:** Support updates, feature enhancements, and maintenance for enterprise content management systems.
* **Agile Collaboration:** Work closely with project managers, QA teams, and senior developers to ensure the timely delivery of project milestones.

**Technical Stack & Requirements**

We do not expect you to be an expert in all of these on day one, but you **must** have foundational knowledge in a few and a strong willingness to learn the rest quickly:

* **Backend & APIs:** Python (Django, Django Rest Framework) and core PHP.
* **Frontend Frameworks:** Next.js, React.js, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.
* **Content Management Systems (CMS) & Low-Code:** Drupal, WordPress, and Webflow.
* **Databases & Tools:** Familiarity with relational databases, Git version control, and basic API testing tools (like Postman).

**Qualifications & Soft Skills**

* **The Mindset:** A passion for technology and an eager willingness to work on *any* tech stack required by the project.
* **Fast Learner:** Ability to grasp new frameworks, tools, and workflows rapidly under the mentorship of senior leadership.
* **Strong Communication:** Ability to collaborate smoothly across different sub-teams (QA, Frontend, UI, Backend).
* **Problem-Solving Skills:** A logical approach to debugging and solving complex code issues.
* Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related engineering field (or equivalent practical experience/bootcamps).

**What’s In It For You?**

* **Unmatched Exposure:** Learn how a diverse, multi-disciplinary tech team operates at scale.
* **Mentorship:** Direct guidance from senior engineering managers and technical leaders.
* **Real-World Impact:** Work on live, production-grade applications and diverse client projects, not just sandbox exercises.
* **Career Growth:** Potential for a full-time role conversion based on outstanding performance during the internship.

Pay: From ₹12,500.00 per month

Benefits:

* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

title: Deployment Engineer, North America
description:
At Locus Robotics, we build AI-powered systems and intelligent robots that keep global supply chains running. Our platform combines advanced AI, real-time decision-making, and autonomous robotics to help leading companies improve efficiency, scale operations, and adapt to constant change.

Locus Robotics is a place to do meaningful work with real-world impact, where your ideas move quickly from concept to deployment. We invest in our people, encourage continuous learning, and give you the opportunity to grow your career while building technology that is used every day at global scale.

Ready to combine advanced robotics, real-world impact, and nationwide travel? As a Deployment Engineer at Locus Robotics, you'll be hands-on with autonomous mobile robots in some of the largest fulfillment centers across the U.S., Canada, and Mexico. You'll map, configure, and launch mission-critical automation systems while building strong customer relationships and seeing the results of your work in real time.

**This role requires extensive travel (up to 90%) across the U.S., Canada, and Mexico, and candidates must reside near a major airport to support frequent travel needs.**

**Responsibilities**

* Implement and deploy complex robotic order fulfillment solutions at customer sites, including the installation and integration of robotic hardware, software, and supporting server infrastructure.
* Create and configure SLAM-based maps of warehouse fulfillment centers using AutoCAD or similar CAD software, ensuring accurate representation of the operational environment.
* Manage onsite customer relationships, coordinating effectively with both internal teams and external stakeholders to ensure alignment and project success.
* Assist with infrastructure setup, robot and software configuration, and provide support during the initial system deployment phase.
* Provide on-site customer support following system installation to ensure smooth operation and address any initial issues or adjustments.
* Perform other duties as required.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree in Robotics Engineering, Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical field.
* 1+ years of experience working with Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs), with demonstrated expertise in deploying warehouse software or logistics systems.
* Must hold a valid passport and the ability to travel throughout the U.S., Canada, and Mexico as needed to support deployments and customer engagements.
* Strong experience with Linux or Unix systems, ROS (Robot Operating System), and SLAM-based navigation**.**
* Deep familiarity in warehouse/fulfillment center mapping.
* Technical knowledge of IT or complex professional systems deployment.
* Ability to lift, pull, and push up to 50lbs.
* Self-motivated and able to solve problems independently and in customer settings.
* Demonstrated proficiency in Spanish (written and verbal) required to effectively communicate with Spanish-speaking clients and team members.
* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, with the ability to effectively engage with internal and external stakeholders at all levels of the organization.

The expected base salary range for this role is $50K to $100K annually, based on external market data, plus bonus and equity. Actual offers will depend on factors such as the candidate's experience, education, training, key or critical skills, geographic location, and current market and business conditions.

**Additional Information**

Locus Robotics is an equal opportunity employer.

Application Fraud Detection Notice: To help maintain a fair and secure hiring process, Locus Robotics may use AI-assisted and other automated tools to detect suspected fraud, misrepresentation, or misuse of the application process. Hiring decisions are not made solely by automated means unless otherwise disclosed where required by law.

It is unlawful in Massachusetts to require or administer a lie detector test as a condition of employment or continued employment. An employer who violates this law shall be subject to criminal penalties and civil liability.

title: Infrastructure Services Support Engineer
description:
**Who is ScriptPro?**

Imagine working at a place where innovation meets impact, and every day brings new opportunities to revolutionize the pharmacy industry! At ScriptPro, you’ll be part of a dynamic team that’s at the cutting edge of technology, creating solutions that make a real difference in people’s lives. ScriptPro develops, sells, and supports state of the art robotics and services in thousands of pharmacy settings around the United States and Canada.

ScriptPro’s Customer Service department delivers high-quality support across a range of products and systems, helping customers navigate technical challenges with confidence. This team operates in a fast-paced environment where problem-solving, adaptability, and continuous learning are key. Every interaction is an opportunity to make a direct impact by resolving issues, building customer trust, and playing a critical role in the overall customer experience.

**Job Summary:** The Infrastructure Services Support Engineer leads and assists with the implementation and deployment of ScriptPro’s cloud and virtual solutions. This is a support role requiring detailed documentation in a ticketing Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system that allows for organizing, tracking, and resolving configuration incidents. On-call rotation is required for critical outages or service interruptions.

**Reporting Relationship:** Director, Infrastructure Services

**Shift:** General business hours are Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST. The position requires availability for on-call duties outside regular hours, including nights, weekends, and holidays. This role is primarily performed remotely, though Kansas City Metro employees may have on-campus requirements according to departmental policy and business need. Generally, all positions may be fully performed on-campus in Mission, KS. Regular, punctual, and predictable attendance is an essential function of every job at ScriptPro.

**Scope of the Role:**

* Support Virtual Machines (VM’s) in vSphere and AOS environments
* Configure and support Azure App Services, Azure Relays, and App Service Plans
* Manage Azure resource groups/resources as recommended by Engineering
* Manage Azure permissions and Azure SSL certificate renewals
* Assist with developing and maintaining policies, installation guides, and documentation for Azure-related services
* Monitor Azure email alerts and take appropriate action as needed
* Serve as a subject matter expert for virtual machines and cloud infrastructure
* Analyze and resolve support incidents and recommend changes to existing configuration processes
* Participate in or lead customer disaster recovery and business continuity testing
* Collaborate with customers to troubleshoot and understand issues that are assigned
* Work independently while establishing procedures and guidelines to perform job functions
* Participate in on-call support phone rotation
* Perform other duties as assigned

**Required Qualifications:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or a related field
* 3+ years of server and network administration
* Experience with cloud infrastructure, including administration and configuration in Azure or AWS
* Knowledge of Azure App Service, Azure Relay, App Service Plans, and Application Insights
* Experience configuring virtual networking solutions (e.g., ASAv or similar), including VPCs, VPNs, and Layer 2 extensions
* Proficiency in vSphere VM templating, customization, deployment, and performance monitoring within the guest OS
* Experience with Nutanix AHV and AOS environments
* Experience creating and deploying OVF/OVA templates with customization
* Experience supporting VMs in a vSphere environment
* Server administration experience across Azure, VMware, AOS, and Windows Server environments
* Experience with remote support tools such as Bomgar or Windows Remote Desktop
* Familiarity with enterprise storage technologies (e.g., SAN, storage tiering, iSCSI, Fibre Channel) is preferred
* General knowledge of industry best practices and technologies
* Strong analytical and critical thinking skills with the ability to assess complex problems and identify root causes
* Excellent organizational and time management skills, with the ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities effectively
* Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build relationships and collaborate across cross-functional teams and all organizational levels
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* Highly motivated, adaptable, and able to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced, and evolving environment

**Preferred Qualifications:**

* CompTIA Security+, A+, or Network +
* Microsoft Certified Solutions Expert (MCSE) in Cloud Platform and Infrastructure
* Microsoft Certified Solutions Architect (MCSA) in Server 2012 or Server 2016
* Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals
* VMware Certified Professional

**Remote Work Requirements:**

* Must have high-speed reliable internet access with a hard-wired connection
* Must have a distraction free home office workspace
* Must be willing to participate in video virtual meetings (camera on)

**Benefits:**

At ScriptPro, we believe that our employees are our greatest asset. That’s why we are committed to fostering a workplace that prioritizes and enhances your personal health and well-being.

* **Health:** Medical, Dental, Vision, Short-Term Disability, Company Paid Life Insurance & Long-Term Disability, 24/7 on campus Gym, and Vitality Wellness Program that helps lower your premium costs
* **Well-being:** Paid Time Off (PTO), Parental Leave, nine (9) paid holidays, paid volunteer hours, Employee Assistance Program, company-sponsored events and team-building activities, 401(k) Retirement Plan with company match, financial investment services, employee discounts on products and services.

**Employment Conditions:**

It is ScriptPro's policy to run a comprehensive background check post job offer and you must be able to obtain Department of Defense security clearance after date of hire. See Standard Form 85 to preview requirements.

This position includes responsibilities for ensuring compliance with cybersecurity and privacy policies to support the safeguarding sensitive data, including personally identifiable information (PII) and Protected Health Information (PHI). Completion of annual cybersecurity and privacy awareness training is required, as the role aligns with the organization’s security posture and risk management practices. All duties are defined in accordance with standardizations to ensure consistency and accountability of the policies.

**Working Conditions:**

Requires routine use of standard equipment and extended computer use. Employee must be able to sit, use hands and fingers, and occasionally lift, squat, stoop, bend, and reach. Problem-solving, practical learning, and instruction interpretation skills are essential.

ScriptPro appreciates the unique qualities of each team member, and as an Equal Opportunity employer, does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, national origin, sex, pregnancy, age, disability, genetic information, veteran status, or any other legally protected status.

The company utilizes internal resources for sourcing and filling positions, but when external assistance is needed, we will engage only with pre-approved, contracted agency partners.

The company does not offer visa sponsorships, and all applicants must have legal authorization to work in the United States.

Please visit www.scriptpro.com to learn more about the mission of our company.

title: Sales Engineer – Material Handling Automation
description:
**Careers at FloStor**
======================

Join our team of innovative professionals dedicated to excellence in material handling solutions. At FloStor, you'll collaborate with industry experts to design and implement cutting-edge automation systems for some of the world's most recognized brands. We offer diverse project experiences, professional growth opportunities, and a collaborative environment where your technical expertise and creative problem-solving skills can thrive. Whether you're working on-site deploying progressive manufacturing technologies or participating in our remote work program, you'll be part of a company with a four-decade legacy of engineering excellence.

**Looking for Great Talent**
----------------------------

We are continually looking for great talent. If you like the excitement of designing new leading edge manufacturing automation at some of the best companies in the world, then you should look into this opportunity. Our engineers love their work best because they are in different facilities every day deploying the most progressive manufacturing techniques available to keep America competitively strong. FloStor Engineering is the leading materials handling integration company in California.

**Remote Work Program**
-----------------------

For qualified candidates residing outside the San Francisco Bay Area, FloStor Engineering has established a program for working remotely. Candidates willing to relocate will be evaluated on a case by case basis.

  

### **Sales Engineer – Material Handling Automation**

**Base salary based on experience, plus commission**

FloStor Engineering is a respected material handling systems integrator based in Hayward, CA. Since 1983, we have helped manufacturers, distributors, and fulfillment operations solve complex material flow challenges through conveyor systems, high-speed sortation, robotics, shelving, racking, mezzanines, controls, and integrated automation.

We are looking for an established Sales Engineer who can develop opportunities, work directly with facility and operations teams, and become a trusted advisor to customers planning automation, expansion, or process improvement projects.

This is an autonomous individual-contributor sales role. You’ll own and grow your opportunities while working closely with FloStor’s design engineering, controls, and project management teams.

#### **What you'll do:**

* Develop and grow a sales territory focused on material handling automation: parcel, box/bag, and pallet conveyance, sortation, packaging, palletizing, and robotic automation.
* Maintain and expand business with existing customers while winning new accounts.
* Work through layout concepts and sketches with customer facilities engineers, evaluating design efficacy and proposing improvements.
* Identify customer pain points such as throughput bottlenecks, space constraints, labor challenges, safety concerns, and inefficient material flow.
* Prepare quotations, drawings, and accurate, profitable proposals.
* Gather customer requirements, operational data, and site constraints to shape practical, profitable system solutions.
* Negotiate fair, profitable solutions that build long-term customer relationships.

#### **What you bring:**

* Minimum 5 years' experience in material handling / system integration sales.
* AutoCAD (LT) proficiency, plus Word, Excel, and Outlook.
* Ability to read, interpret, and communicate through drawings and sketches.
* Strong written and verbal communication.
* BS in Mechanical Engineering preferred but not required—relevant experience matters more.

#### **Travel:**

* Regular travel throughout the greater San Francisco Bay Area and San Joaquin Valley is expected. Occasional travel to customer sites across the continental U.S. is possible.

#### **Compensation & Benefits:**

* Base salary plus commission on the first dollar of gross profit—no ceiling on earnings.
* Medical, dental, vision (100% of associate premium paid; 50% of family), $25,000 life insurance, 401(k). Car allowance; cell phone, computer, and business tools provided.

#### **Why FloStor?**

You’ll represent a company with more than four decades of credibility, a strong installed base, deep technical resources, and the ability to deliver complete systems rather than isolated equipment. For the right Sales Engineer, this is an opportunity to build long-term customer relationships with strong technical backing and uncapped earning potential.

Reply to:

VP Operations

information@flostor.com

  

**How to Apply**
----------------

To apply for any of the positions above, please send your resume and cover letter to the email address listed with the job description. Please include the position title in the subject line of your email.

FloStor Engineering is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, veteran status, and other protected characteristics.

title: Robotics Systems Engineer (Mechatronics & Integration)
description:
*Looking for engineers who prefer to build in the lab and test in the field rather than stare at CAD files all day.*

We are seeking a versatile **Robotics Systems Engineer** to own the end-to-end development, integration, and deployment of our autonomous robotic platforms. In this role, you will bridge the gap between mechanical design, electronics, and autonomous software. You will be responsible for ensuring our systems transition seamlessly from the lab to the field, delivering rugged, high-performance hardware capable of operating in demanding, real-world environments.

This is a **highly hands-on, multidisciplinary role** for an engineer who thrives on solving problems where hardware and software intersect.

Key Responsibilities

* **Systems Architecture:** Design, build, and integrate mechanical structures, drivetrain assemblies, power distribution, and robust communication protocols.
* **Sensor & Control Integration:** Select, calibrate, and integrate perception and navigation suites (LiDAR, Cameras, RADAR, GNSS, IMU, and Sonar).
* **Field Deployment:** Lead iterative field testing to validate vehicle performance, edge-case handling, and environmental durability.
* **Cross-Functional Debugging:** Diagnose and resolve complex, system-level failures spanning hardware, embedded firmware, and software layers.
* **Collaboration:** Partner closely with software, control, and product teams to translate autonomy algorithms into physical performance.
* **Technical Documentation:** Maintain system schematics, wiring diagrams, testing logs, and standard operating procedures (SOPs).

Required Qualifications & Skills

* **Education:** Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Mechatronics, Robotics, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline.
* **Core Experience:** 1–3 years of experience in the design and development of complex electromechanical systems or mobile robotic platforms.
* **Software Proficiency:** Strong proficiency in **ROS/ROS2** and solid programming skills in **C++ or Python**.
* **Hardware Design:** Extensive experience with CAD software (e.g., Fusion 360, SolidWorks, Autodesk) and electrical schematic design tools.
* **Hands-on Capability:** Proven ability to work on hardware—including soldering, wiring, power tools, mechanical fabrication, and the use of diagnostic tools (oscilloscopes, multimeters, logic analyzers).
* **Problem-Solving:** Excellent diagnostic skills and the ability to articulate technical roadblocks clearly to diverse, cross-functional teams.

Why Join Us?

You will be at the center of the development lifecycle, seeing your design choices translated into real-world performance. If you enjoy a mix of CAD design, sensor fusion, and field debugging, this role offers the autonomy and impact you’ve been looking for.

Pay: ₹200,000.00 - ₹500,000.00 per year

Ability to commute/relocate:

* Hyderabad, Telangana (Hyderabad, Hyderabad District): Reliably commute or planning to relocate before starting work (Required)

Experience:

* Robotics Engineering: 1 year (Required)

Willingness to travel:

* 50% (Preferred)

Work Location: In person

title: Senior Consultant––AI & Power Platform Engineer - Multistate - Hyderabad
description:
Do you have a passion to work for US based clients of Deloitte Tax and transform their current state of tax to the next generation of tax functions? Are you ready to take the next step in your career to find new methods and processes to assist clients in improving their tax operations? Are you ready to fulfill your potential and want to have a significant impact to global initiatives? If the answer to all of the above is “Yes,” come join MTS group in Deloitte India (Offices of the U.S), a service line of Deloitte Tax LLP!

**Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited** commenced operations in June 2004. Since then, nearly all of the Deloitte Tax LLP (“Deloitte Tax”) U.S. service lines have obtained support through Deloitte Tax in India. Deloitte Tax in India offers you opportunities to learn U.S. taxation, a much sought-after career option.

**At Deloitte**, we are leading clients through the tax transformation taking place in the marketplace. We offer a broad range of fully integrated tax services and **add greater impact to clients** by **combining technology and tax technical** resources to uncover insights and smarter solutions for navigating an increasingly complex global environment.

**Work you’ll do**

Tax Technology professionals at Deloitte combine insight and innovation from multiple disciplines with business and industry knowledge to help our clients excel globally. We are looking for driven individuals having a passion for technology - whether its programming applications, automation or datacenter operational excellence. If you like to figure out how to make the new technologies work in a corporate environment, then our teams might be a fit for you.

**The Team**

The MDT group is focused on delivering differentiated service offerings through the use of new technologies such as Data Wrangling, Data Analytics, Business Intelligence (BI), Robotic Process Automation (RPA), Optical Character Recognition (OCR), and Machine Learning. This group enables the Multi-state Tax Services (MTS) practice to drive profitability and growth, through application of emerging and existing technologies and enhanced utilization of Tax tools and software. We support MTS teams by assessing and addressing their data and technology challenges on client engagements, internal processes and data intensive projects to help achieve efficiencies, win clients and create differentiated services. With the exponential growth of accessible data, there is an increasing need to bring data and technology capabilities to help address client needs and support Deloitte MTS engagements and solutions.

**Work Location**: Hyderabad

**Time** - 11 am- 8pm

**Key Responsibilities**

* Build, customize, and maintain applications using Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI).
* Design and develop AI-powered business solutions using Azure OpenAI, emphasizing prompt engineering and solution integration.
* Write, test, and deploy robust Python scripts for data processing and system integration.
* Design, optimize, and manage SQL and/or NoSQL databases to support cloud-based and on-premises applications.
* Translate business requirements into scalable, technical prototypes and production-ready solutions.
* Identify challenges quickly and formulate effective, innovative solutions leveraging AI, automation, and cloud services.

**Qualifications & Experience**

* 4+ years of professional experience in technology roles (software engineering, data engineering, solution architecture, etc.).
* Minimum 3 years of hands-on work in Azure OpenAI/AI engineering and Power Platform (including Power Apps).
* Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience with: Azure OpenAI and LLM-based solution engineering, including prompt design. Microsoft Power Platform—with deep expertise in Power Apps.
* Strong Python programming skills for scripting and automation. Familiarity with additional Azure services (e.g., Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions, Cosmos DB, API Management).
* Proven expertise in SQL and/or NoSQL database design, management, and optimization.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills; strong team collaborator.

**Our purpose**

  
Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.

**Our people and culture**

  
Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.

**Professional development**

  
At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state-of-the-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.

**Benefits to help you thrive**

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.

**Recruiting tips**

  
From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: Senior Manager – Robotic Automation Solutions & Engineering
description:

title: Data Scientist, Risk & Quant Analytics, Hong Kong
Senior Data Scientist
description:
Veeva Systems is a mission-driven organization and pioneer in industry cloud, helping life sciences companies bring therapies to patients faster. As one of the fastest-growing SaaS companies in history, we surpassed $3B in revenue in our last fiscal year with extensive growth potential ahead.

At the heart of Veeva are our values: Do the Right Thing, Customer Success, Employee Success, and Speed. We're not just any public company – we made history in 2021 by becoming a public benefit corporation (PBC), legally bound to balancing the interests of customers, employees, society, and investors.

As a Work Anywhere company, we support your flexibility to work from home or in the office, so you can thrive in your ideal environment.

Join us in transforming the life sciences industry, committed to making a positive impact on its customers, employees, and communities.

### **The Role**

As a Senior Data Scientist on the Veeva Compass Patient team, you will be a founding data scientist that owns the greenfield design methodologies and models that tackle large scale complex health data issues. An example of opportunities for this role include:

Tackle the unwinding of the "Super Patient" anomaly, a data-merging challenge causing abandonment of high-value clinical transactions. This person will be excited about having complete latitude to pioneer creative, inference-based models—leveraging techniques ranging from token entropy scoring to clinical transaction pattern recognition—to successfully unravel complex identity overlaps and salvage mission-critical data without relying on the raw PHI.

Build a support structure for natural language search interface on top of medical and pharmacy claims data, for users to query data outside of traditional SQL-like query tools. This person will be excited about applying NLP, ML, and AI principles on a large data set and returning accurate, performant results across a variety of health data attributes.

You are excited about statistics and data science at scale on big data and taking billions of records to build algorithms in a computationally efficient and statistically effective manner while being able to keep the business problems we are working to solve in mind. You’ll work closely with Product Managers, Data Analysts, and Engineering teams to design and deliver features, including performance measurement, anomaly detection, and quality monitoring.

This is a great opportunity to be at the forefront of innovation and help us solve some of the most challenging problems in healthcare data and analytics.

### **What You'll Do**

* Apply statistical, machine learning, and data mining techniques to large health data sets to build new products and methodologies
* Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Analysts, Software Engineers, Data Engineers, and QA to discover and deliver product offerings from prototype to scale, then iterate and enhance
* Build data science driven approaches to solve “known” core problems to the business, and conduct more broad exploration to uncover the “unknown,” and drive new improvement opportunities
* Explore and find meaning in high volumes of data, identify signals and patterns to identify relationships to infer the universe from imperfect data. Important skills include querying, data cleansing, experiment design, solution assessment, and identifying scaling challenges
* Rapidly build prototype product solutions, communicate findings, and iterate
* Draw from prior experience and technical expertise to identify product improvements and inform testing plans; break overall objectives down into underlying problems that can be prioritized and solved

### **Requirements**

* 4+ years of hands-on data science and statistics experience (or 2+ years with a Ph.D degree), demonstrating increasing responsibility and impact over time, including experience as the point person
* M.S. or Ph.D. in Applied Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Machine Learning or another quantitative discipline
* Fluent in Python
* Experience with healthcare data, including prescription / medical claims data, EHR data, Lab data, Specialty Pharmacy data, copay data
* Strong analytical skills and curiosity
* Experience in at least one framework for large datasets (e.g. Spark)
* Experience working with large quantities of data to develop models that work in a stable, production approach with live data
* Experience working with engineering to productionalize models including scaling, monitoring, and documentation
* Comfortable with ambiguity and breaking goals down into tangible and actionable work plans
* Demonstrated ability to communicate statistical, mathematical, and computational concepts to audiences of varying technical levels
* Ability to work independently and across internal teams

### **Nice to Have**

* Experience in life sciences industry
* Software engineering in a production environment
* Software engineering in a commercial cloud environment

**Required Qualification:**

title: Applied Scientist, International Machine Learning
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------

Do you want to join an innovative team of scientists who use machine learning and statistical techniques to create state-of-the-art solutions for providing better value to Amazon’s customers? Do you want to build and deploy advanced ML systems that help optimize millions of transactions every day? Are you excited by the prospect of analyzing and modeling terabytes of data to solve real-world problems? Do you like to own end-to-end business problems/metrics and directly impact the profitability of the company? Do you like to innovate and simplify? If yes, then you may be a great fit to join the Machine Learning team for India Consumer Businesses.  
  
Machine Learning, Big Data and related quantitative sciences have been strategic to Amazon from the early years. Amazon has been a pioneer in areas such as recommendation engines, ecommerce fraud detection and large-scale optimization of fulfillment center operations. As Amazon has rapidly grown and diversified, the opportunity for applying machine learning has exploded. We have a very broad collection of practical problems where machine learning systems can dramatically improve the customer experience, reduce cost, and drive speed and automation. These include product bundle recommendations for millions of products, safeguarding financial transactions across by building the risk models, improving catalog quality via extracting product attribute values from structured/unstructured data for millions of products, enhancing address quality by powering customer suggestions  
  
We are developing state-of-the-art machine learning solutions to accelerate the Amazon India growth story. Amazon India is an exciting place to be at for a machine learning practitioner. We have the eagerness of a fresh startup to absorb machine learning solutions, and the scale of a mature firm to help support their development at the same time. As part of the India Machine Learning team, you will get to work alongside brilliant minds motivated to solve real-world machine learning problems that make a difference to millions of our customers. We encourage thought leadership and blue ocean thinking in ML.  
  
Key job responsibilities  
Use machine learning and analytical techniques to create scalable solutions for business problems  
Analyze and extract relevant information from large amounts of Amazon’s historical business data to help automate and optimize key processes  
Design, develop, evaluate and deploy, innovative and highly scalable ML models  
Work closely with software engineering teams to drive real-time model implementations  
Work closely with business partners to identify problems and propose machine learning solutions  
Establish scalable, efficient, automated processes for large scale data analyses, model development, model validation and model maintenance  
Work proactively with engineering teams and product managers to evangelize new algorithms and drive the implementation of large-scale complex ML models in production  
Leading projects and mentoring other scientists, engineers in the use of ML techniques  
  
About the team  
International Machine Learning Team is responsible for building novel ML solutions that attack India first (and other Emerging Markets across MENA and LatAm) problems and impact the bottom-line and top-line of India business. Learn more about our team from https://www.amazon.science/working-at-amazon/how-rajeev-rastogis-machine-learning-team-in-india-develops-innovations-for-customers-worldwide

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Experience programming in Java, C++, Python or related language
* Experience with SQL and an RDBMS (e.g., Oracle) or Data Warehouse

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience implementing algorithms using both toolkits and self-developed code
* Have publications at top-tier peer-reviewed conferences or journals

  
Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

**About Us**

Synchrony is more than a financial services company, we’re a team of passionate innovators committed to delivering best-in-class solutions that support millions of customers across the U.S. With a bold focus on technology, data, and digital innovation, we create meaningful experiences that simplify lives and enable financial wellness.

When you join Synchrony, you become part of an inclusive culture where your voice matters, your growth is championed, and your work drives impactful results.

**Job Description**
-------------------

2601794

Technology

**Company Overview:**

Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) is a premier consumer financial services company delivering one of the industry’s most complete digitally enabled product suites. Our experience, expertise and scale encompass a broad spectrum of industries including digital, health and wellness, retail, telecommunications, home, auto, outdoors, pet and more.

* We have recently been ranked #2 among India’s Best Companies to Work for by Great Place to Work. We were among the Top 50 India’s Best Workplaces in Building a Culture of Innovation by All by GPTW and Top 25 among Best Workplaces in BFSI by GPTW. We have also been recognized by AmbitionBox Employee Choice Awards among the Top 20 Mid-Sized Companies, ranked #3 among Top Rated Companies for Women, and Top-Rated Financial Services Companies.
* We provide best-in-class employee benefits and programs that cater to work-life integration and overall well-being.
* We provide career advancement and upskilling opportunities, for all to take up leadership roles.

**Organizational Overview:**

Our Analytics organization comprises of data analysts who focus on enabling strategies to enhance customer and partner experience and optimize business performance through data management and develop

ment of full stack descriptive to prescriptive analytics solutions using cutting edge technologies thereby enabling business growth.

**Role Summary/Purpose:**

The AVP, Analytics Metadata Developer (Individual contributor) within Synchrony’s Data Office will be responsible for supporting execution of the metadata management and data cataloging strategy for Synchrony. The individual will be reporting to the VP, Metadata Management and Data Sourcing Leader.

This role will collaborate with business and IT leaders, data management process owners, and analytics stakeholders across Synchrony to support the ongoing enhancement and modernization of our metadata management capabilities.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Stay current on Ab Initio product releases and industry trends, proactively proposing enhancements that improve outcomes for our stakeholders
* Provide knowledge transfer, coaching, and implementation guidance to team members to promote consistent patterns, standards, and best practices
* Support evaluation and development of forward-looking metadata capabilities, including enablement for cloud, AI/ML, and other emerging use cases (e.g., semantic metadata, tagging, and discoverability)
* Contribute to root cause analysis and remediation of data issues related to our metadata platforms and/or processes
* Partner with data governance, engineering, and analytics stakeholders to ensure metadata quality, lineage completeness, and consistent adoption of platform capabilities
* Create and maintain operational runbooks and support documentation to enable consistent operations, troubleshooting, and ongoing maintenance by the broader team
* Execute thorough functional and non-functional testing, and remediate defects to ensure enhancements meet performance, security, and reliability expectations
* Implement platform changes (e.g., metadata models, configurations, integrations, automation, and workflows) in accordance with established Agile and change management practices
* Produce clear, scalable solution designs for enhancements, prioritizing simplicity, reusability, and long-term supportability
* Elicit, document, and validate requirements for assigned platform enhancements, ensuring alignment with enterprise standards and stakeholder needs
* Identify and recommend platform improvement opportunities that increase usability, reliability, scalability, and maintainability
* Develop and maintain a detailed understanding of Synchrony’s current metadata platform implementation, including configurations, integrations, and operational processes

**Qualifications/Requirements:**

* Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field; or in lieu of a Bachelor Degree, a minimum of 11 years as described.

* Minimum of 7 years of work experience to include:

* 4 years of **Ab Initio Metadata Hub** development, including technical design, coding / implementation and ongoing support
* 7 years of experience with Agile methodology and tools
* 7 years of relevant data management / governance or project/program management experience
* Experience within Financial Services industry

**Desired Characteristics:**

* Strong interpersonal skills to lead cross-functional teams, foster collaboration and drive consensus across stakeholder groups
* Experience using Agile and SAFE Agile methodologies
* Ability to direct technical teams and mentor/coach team members
* Exceptional problem-solving, communication and leadership abilities
* Credit card domain knowledge is desired
* Experience working in financial services in the credit card domain is desired in particular

**Eligibility Criteria:**

Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field and 7 years of **Ab Initio Metadata Hub** development, including technical design, coding / implementation and ongoing support; or in lieu of a Bachelor Degree, a minimum of 11 years as described

**Work Timings:** **2 PM to 11 PM IST**

This role qualifies for Enhanced Flexibility offered in Synchrony India and will require the incumbent to be available between 06:00 AM Eastern Time – 11:30 AM Eastern Time (timings are anchored to US Eastern hours and will adjust twice a year locally). This window is for meetings with India and US teams. The remaining hours will be flexible for the employee to choose. Exceptions may periodically due to business needs)
  
We are proud to offer flexibility at Synchrony. Our way of working allows you the option to work from home or workspaces in our Regional Engagement Hubs—Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Pune, Kolkata, or Delhi/NCR.
  
Occasionally you may be required to commute or travel to Hyderabad or one of the Regional Engagement Hubs for in person engagement activities such as business or team meetings, trainings, and culture events.

title: Lead Full-stack Software Developer
description:

The ideal candidate will possess deep expertise in full-stack development, with a strong emphasis on modern web technologies, microservices architecture, and cloud-native solutions on AWS.  
  
This is a remote position.

* UI/UX Implementation: Build the front-end of applications through appealing visual design, utilizing modern UI templates, HTML5, CSS, and Angular to ensure responsive and seamless user experiences.
* Cloud Architecture: Architect, deploy, and maintain secure and scalable cloud environments using AWS services (e.g., EC2, S3, Lambda, API Gateway).
* System Integration: Design and implement RESTful APIs and microservices, to maintain efficient data flow between the frontend, backend, and database layers.

* Agile Collaboration: Work closely with stakeholders, product managers, and UI/UX designers in an Agile environment to translate business requirements into technical solutions.

**Required Experience & Qualifications:**

* Backend Technologies: Strong proficiency in Java with deep expertise in the Spring Boot framework for building enterprise-grade microservices.
* Server-Side JavaScript: Solid experience with Node.js for backend development, API integration, or tooling.

* Version Control & CI/CD: Proficiency with Git and modern CI/CD pipeline tools.
